settingsPageSubtitle: Manage how this wiki is named, what you import, which library documents are linked, and the page list. Open the workspace to edit pages and explore the link graph.
toastSpaceNameRequired: Enter a name for this wiki space.
sectionSemanticHint: Pick the embedding model used to build vectors (or keep the global default). Meaning-based matching in the workspace sidebar only works after a successful index build; saving a page does not refresh vectors.
semanticNoEmbedding: No usable embedding model is configured yet (Models → Embedding → attach a provider with a base URL and set a default). Semantic options are disabled.
semanticEmbeddingHint: Leave as global default, or choose a specific embedding model. Rebuild the index after changing so existing pages match the selected model.
semanticTopKHint: Positive integer; caps how many meaning-based matches the workspace sidebar can return.
semanticSimilarityHint: When the filter only uses meaning-based matches (no title or path hit from the server), pages must reach at least this similarity score (0–1, higher is stricter).
toastSemanticTopKInvalid: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
toastSemanticIndexFailed: Could not build the semantic index
sectionImportsHint: Bring pages and attachments from an Obsidian vault, or start a blank page.
sectionPagesHint: Administrative list with last updated time. Open a row or use Open workspace to edit in context.
sectionLinkedDocsHint: Channel documents linked for search and Copilot. They stay in your document library.
loadFailed: Could not load this wiki space.
importFolderTitle: Upload an Obsidian vault folder (.md + attachments). Skips .obsidian and .trash.
importZipTitle: Upload a zip of your vault (same layout as folder import).
noLinkedDocsHint: No channel documents linked yet. Use Add documents to pick from your library.
toastNoFilesSelected: No files were selected (or the folder is empty).
docPickerHint: Choose documents you already have in openKMS. Use search and the channel filter to narrow the list.
vaultModalHint: Set skip options, then choose your folder. The browser will ask once to allow reading those files (sites cannot remove that step). Import starts as soon as you confirm there—no second click in this dialog.

copilot.title: Wiki Copilot
copilot.intro: Ask about this wiki: pages, content, or linked channel documents.
copilot.inputPlaceholder: Ask about this wiki… Type / for skills
copilot.composerHint: / skills · Enter to send · Shift+Enter new line
copilot.toastLoadMessagesFailed: Failed to load messages for this chat
copilot.toastConversationStale: That chat is no longer available; switched to your latest chat.
copilot.toastRestartWait: Wait until this message is saved, then use restart.
copilot.confirmRestart: Remove this message and everything after it? Your text will reappear in the input so you can edit and resend.
copilot.toastRestartOk: You can edit and resend to continue from here.
copilot.confirmDeleteChat: Delete this chat and its messages? This cannot be undone.
copilot.restartTitle: Remove this and later messages; your text returns to the input to edit and resend
copilot.noChatsYet: No chats yet — your first message starts one
